description: Relocate BM2 into monorepo app path while preserving BM2 domain assets and behavior.
deviation_notes: Phase 1-2 and Phase 3 verification complete. BM2 governance tests fail due to excluded files (conductor/, docs/, tests/, README.md, proxy.ts) - expected since these are repo-structure tests not app tests. BM2 pre-existing 351 typecheck errors (vs 354 in original repo).
